Kaylee Bodtcher

About Me

My name is Kaylee, I enjoy drawing, painting, writing, and riding horses. I have a twin sister, an older brother, and two cats.

Favorites

My favorite colors are green, pink and yellow, my favorite animals are horses and bears.
